mapper.insert: INSERT INTO password_reset_code (user_id, email, scene, code_hash, expire_at, used_at, status, attempt_count, request_ip, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{email}, #{scene}, #{codeHash}, #{expireAt}, #{usedAt}, #{status}, #{attemptCount}, #{requestIp}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, email, scene, code_hash, expire_at, used_at, status, attempt_count, request_ip, created_at, updated_at FROM password_reset_code WHERE email = #{email} AND scene = #{scene} AND status = 0 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
